form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (25.61) at this track over 450m. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (25.46) when fifth over 450m at Ballarat in a Grade 4/5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed eight times. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when second behind Whodat Jewel at this track last start over 450m (25.34). Likely to play a major role.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Horsham over 485m in 27.29. Followed that up with a minor placing over 525m at The Meadows at Grade 5 H five days ago. Going well and can bounce back to winning form.
